nasb.text: The Lord restored the fortunes of Job when he prayed for his friends, and the Lord increased all that Job had twofold.

esv.text: And the Lord  restored the fortunes of Job, when he had prayed for his friends. And the Lord gave Job twice as much as he had before.

cnv.text: 約伯替他的朋友禱告，耶和華就恢復約伯原來的景況，還照約伯以前所有的一切加倍賜給他。

ccb.text: 约伯为朋友们祷告后，耶和华恢复了他以前的昌盛，并且耶和华赐给他的比以前多一倍。
